## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — maintenance, deps, config
- [ ] refactor — no functional change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if release)
